overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a sunlit historic cemetery and memorial garden adjacent to a stone cathedral. The character walks along stone pathways, pauses at a candle-lit shrine overlooking a scenic valley, and continues through gravestones in warm late-afternoon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone pathway alongside cathedral apse wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone path beside the cathedral wall with two swords on back

entered.detail: tall curved stone wall of cathedral with arched windows and weathered texture
irregular stone tile pathway with grass growing between cracks
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the path
lush green bushes with red and purple flowers

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow stone pathway beside a large Gothic cathedral wall. Tall cypress trees and flowering bushes line the path as warm golden sunlight casts long shadows across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: memorial shrine with panoramic valley overlook

events.description: exiting narrow cathedral path into open memorial garden with valley vista
encountering mourner standing solemnly near the candle-lit shrine

agents.ego_description: approaching the memorial shrine and pausing to observe the mourner and valley view

notable_agents.action: mourner standing solemnly near shrine with lit candles, appearing to pray

entered.detail: classical stone shrine structure with triangular pediment and columns
multiple burning candles arranged on steps of the shrine
black wrought iron fence surrounding the shrine area
expansive view of green rolling hills and distant mountains
hazy blue mountain range on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide memorial garden with a classical stone shrine adorned with burning candles. A mourner stands near the shrine while the camera reveals a breathtaking valley vista with distant mountains. The character pauses briefly to observe the scene before moving on.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside overlook with panoramic valley view

events.description: leaving stone path to walk through dense vegetation toward cliff edge

agents.ego_description: walking through dense vegetation to cliff edge to admire the valley panorama

entered.detail: mature olive tree with gnarled trunk and silvery-green leaves
rocky outcrop forming the edge of the overlook
small settlement with red roofs visible in the valley below
green forested hills stretching into the distance

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the path to push through dense vegetation toward a cliff edge. From this vantage point, the view opens to reveal a distant village nestled in rolling green hills. A large olive tree stands at the edge as the character surveys the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral cloister walkway with stone archway

events.description: returning to enclosed path alongside cathedral wall
passing peasant standing near cathedral entrance with staff

agents.ego_description: returning to the cathedral path and passing a peasant standing near the wall

notable_agents.action: peasant holding wooden staff standing near cathedral wall entrance

entered.detail: returning to the tall stone cathedral wall with arched windows
large stone arch connecting cathedral sections covered in vines
massive oak tree with spreading branches casting dappled shade
weathered stone grave markers beginning to appear along path

segments.scene_description: The character turns back from the overlook and returns to the enclosed path alongside the cathedral. Passing under a large stone archway covered in vines, the character walks by a peasant with a staff. Gravestones begin to appear along the path as the cemetery area approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cemetery with stone monuments and gravestones

events.description: entering cemetery proper with numerous gravestones and monuments

agents.ego_description: walking through the cemetery past various gravestones and stone monuments

entered.detail: tall ornate stone memorials and obelisks among the graves
decorative wrought iron gate at cemetery entrance or exit
flanking pillars marking cemetery boundaries

segments.scene_description: The character enters the main cemetery area, surrounded by numerous gravestones and tall stone monuments. The path winds through the burial ground under dappled sunlight filtering through trees. An ornate iron gate is visible ahead as the character continues exploring the historic cemetery.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins along the walls of a Gothic cathedral and expands into a scenic overlook before returning to the depths of a historic cemetery. It begins on a narrow stone pathway lined with cypress trees and flowering bushes, where warm golden sunlight casts long shadows. As the path opens into a wide memorial garden, the camera passes a candle-lit shrine and a mourner to reveal a breathtaking valley vista with distant mountains, before pushing through dense vegetation toward a cliff edge and a large olive tree overlooking a remote village. The scene then shifts as the character turns back toward the cathedral, passing under a vine-covered stone archway and by a peasant with a staff. Finally, the camera enters the main burial ground, winding through a landscape of ornate monuments and gravestones under dappled sunlight toward a distant iron gate.
